title: lithocarpus lithocarpaeus
intro: Lithocarpus lithocarpaeus, also known as the Bur oak or Lithocarpus, is a deciduous tree species that belongs to the beech family (Fagaceae). The plant is rich in medicinal properties, with its bark and leaves exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Lithocarpus lithocarpaeus include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and improve cardiovascular health. The herbal preparation of Lithocarpus lithocarpaeus typically involves drying the bark and leaves to create tea or infusions that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
